plan.empty: No eating plan yet. Add one during setup or from Home.
plan.tapHint: Tap Edit to adjust meals, items and portions — totals update as you go.

program.empty: No training program yet. Add one during setup or from Home.
program.tapHint: Tap Edit to adjust days, exercises, sets, reps and load.

auth.tagline: A quiet log of meals, water & movement.
auth.orEmail: or get a link by email
auth.noPasswords: No passwords — ever. The link signs you in.
auth.consentBody: Vita receives your name and email — nothing else. No posting, no contacts.
auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to
auth.invalidLink: That sign-in link didn't work — it may have expired or already been used. Ask for a fresh one below.
auth.sendError: Vita couldn't send the link just now. Try again in a moment.
auth.oidcUnavailable: Google and Apple sign-in need the full app. Use an email link for now.

keepTrack.title: What would you like to keep an eye on?
keepTrack.subtitle: Just your own reference — Vita never sets targets or scores.

plan.title: Do you follow an eating plan?
plan.subtitle: Describe it, paste it, or import your nutritionist's PDF — Vita reads it back for you to confirm.
plan.describeSub: type or dictate, in your own words
plan.importSub: text or a PDF from your nutritionist
plan.importNote: PDF import isn't in this build yet — paste the plan as text.
plan.inputPlaceholder: e.g. low carb on weekdays, flexible weekends…

program.title: A training program in progress?
program.subtitle: Same idea — describe it or import it, and confirm the summary.
program.importSub: or paste the plan as text
program.importNote: Gym-app import isn't in this build yet — paste the program as text.
program.noneSub: workouts can still be logged anytime
program.inputPlaceholder: e.g. Mon — legs · Wed — push · Fri — pull

planShared.readError: That didn't quite read as a plan.
planShared.readErrorSub: Try describing it again, or skip for now.

connect.title: Bring what you already use
connect.subtitle: Vita reads workouts, activity and cycle data from apps you approve.
connect.privacy: Vita reads only what you approve.

allSet.title: All set, {{name}}.
allSet.philosophy: Vita records what you tell it and shows it back — it never sets goals, grades your day, or gives advice.
allSet.tryIt: Try it — say what you ate today.

home.emptyTimeline: Nothing logged yet today. Tell Vita below.

mealDetail.footer: Estimated by Vita from your description.

waterDetail.footer: A quiet log of what you drank.

workoutDetail.footer: A quiet log of how you moved.

capture.estimatedBy: Estimated by Vita from your description
capture.parseError: Vita couldn't be reached. Your words are kept — try again.

photo.a11yLabel: Add a photo of your meal or workout
photo.denied: Vita needs access to your photos to read a plate or whiteboard. Turn it on in Settings, or type instead. Photos are read once and never stored.
photo.error: Vita couldn't open your photos. You can type instead.
photo.unrecognized: Vita couldn't find a meal or workout in that photo. Try another, or type it instead.
photo.tooLarge: That image is a little large. Try another, or type it instead.

voice.a11yHint: Tap to type. Press and hold to speak.
voice.denied: Vita needs the microphone to hear you. Turn it on in Settings, or type instead. Audio never leaves your device.
voice.unavailable: Voice input isn't available on this device yet. You can type instead.
voice.error: Vita didn't catch that. Try again, or type instead.

trends.title: Trends
trends.notYet: Trends aren't in this build yet.

habits.title: Habits & check-ins
habits.notYet: Habits aren't in this build yet.
